meta.title: DEF CON Safe Mode Payment Village - Menaka BaskerPillai  - Architecting Modern Payment Gateways
meta.description: In this session am going to explain how to work with payment gateways and how to implement a secured payment gateways in .net core web Apps. This session also includes some core concepts of Azure that plays an important role in transaction.
